name: Notional currency—Leg 2
description: The ISO 4217 currency code for the currency in which Notional amount—Leg 2 is denominated.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required where Notional amount—Leg 2 is reported.
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO Action types.
valueRules: If reported, the value is an ISO 4217 code, but excluding XAG, XAU, XBA, XBB, XBC, XBD, XDR, XEU, XFU, XPD, XPT and XTS.
For an FX transaction where the underlier is a currency index or a basket of currencies, Notional currency—Leg 2 is reported as the ISO 4217 code of XXX.
